content.json:
# Trustee Due Date Metrics

Tracks the completeness of key date entries for Chapter 7 trustee appointments. Powered by the `SYNC-TRUSTEE-DUE-DATE-METRICS` daily dataflow (runs at 05:00 UTC).

## Overall Completeness Over Time
Percentage of Chapter 7 trustee appointments with all 9 key dates populated (complete), some (partial), or none.

content.query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-DUE-DATE-METRICS"
| where name == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend
    Complete = todouble(customDimensions.completePercent),
    Partial = todouble(customDimensions.partialPercent),
    None = todouble(customDimensions.nonePercent)
| summarize
    Complete = max(Complete),
    Partial = max(Partial),
    None = max(None)
    by Day = startofday(timestamp)
| order by Day asc

content.json:
## Total Chapter 7 Appointments Over Time
Total number of Chapter 7 trustee appointments tracked in the system.

content.query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-DUE-DATE-METRICS"
| where name == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend Total = todouble(customDimensions.totalChapter7Appointments)
| summarize TotalAppointments = max(Total) by Day = startofday(timestamp)
| order by Day asc

content.json:
## Manual Entry Field Completion Over Time
Percentage of Chapter 7 appointments with each manually-entered key date field populated.

content.query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-DUE-DATE-METRICS"
| where name == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend
    TprReviewPeriod = todouble(customDimensions.tprReviewPeriodPercent),
    PastFieldExam = todouble(customDimensions.pastFieldExamPercent),
    PastIndependentAudit = todouble(customDimensions.pastIndependentAuditPercent),
    TirReviewPeriod = todouble(customDimensions.tirReviewPeriodPercent)
| summarize
    TprReviewPeriod = max(TprReviewPeriod),
    PastFieldExam = max(PastFieldExam),
    PastIndependentAudit = max(PastIndependentAudit),
    TirReviewPeriod = max(TirReviewPeriod)
    by Day = startofday(timestamp)
| order by Day asc

content.json:
## Calculated Field Completion Over Time
Percentage of Chapter 7 appointments with each auto-calculated key date field populated.

content.query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-DUE-DATE-METRICS"
| where name == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend
    TprDueDate = todouble(customDimensions.tprDueDatePercent),
    UpcomingFieldExam = todouble(customDimensions.upcomingFieldExamPercent),
    UpcomingIndependentAuditRequired = todouble(customDimensions.upcomingIndependentAuditRequiredPercent),
    TirSubmission = todouble(customDimensions.tirSubmissionPercent),
    TirReviewDueDate = todouble(customDimensions.tirReviewDueDatePercent)
| summarize
    TprDueDate = max(TprDueDate),
    UpcomingFieldExam = max(UpcomingFieldExam),
    UpcomingIndependentAuditRequired = max(UpcomingIndependentAuditRequired),
    TirSubmission = max(TirSubmission),
    TirReviewDueDate = max(TirReviewDueDate)
    by Day = startofday(timestamp)
| order by Day asc

content.json:
## Dataflow Health
Success/failure runs of the daily sync job.

content.query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions.moduleName == "SYNC-TRUSTEE-DUE-DATE-METRICS"
| where name == "DataflowHandlerComplete"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend Success = tobool(customDimensions.success)
| summarize
    Successes = countif(Success == true),
    Failures = countif(Success == false)
    by Day = startofday(timestamp)
| order by Day asc
